hdda71e0dg4b26g4e2aga5dag8e5c747fd94f: A commendable choice. The horde must be thinned.
hd2b20b7fg3e9bg4748gaaf9g76fe5a9c3c85: The more dead goblins, the better.
h8096b304g0712g4d92g8805gf781e79bf5c6: There will be more. We will slice open their stomachs and bathe in the blood.
h056843c2ged39g4c0fg8739gb8f755eac080: Is it commendable? The goblin could have known something useful.
h5c30c6f6gb3bbg4560gbe1fg111417b875a9: Such vermin serves but one use: fodder for our weapons.
h80531e9agf8bbg4d78gbe33g0ba2c47c2d6d: If I've one regret, it's that I didn't fire the arrow myself.
h46cc0f12gede9g4e75g9878g3d6408f5b920: Killing a defenceless prisoner is cruelty.
